notes: Donut emerges from the blob able to talk. The Enhanced Pet Biscuit's 'Enhanced Growth' buff kept her a cat but reset her stats (Str 11, Int 11, Con 2, Dex 8, Cha 25) and now grants +1 Str/Int and +2 Cha per level with no manual points. She's reclassified from pet to full crawler. Having the highest combined stats, she becomes party leader: she names the party 'The Royal Court of Princess Donut', titles herself 'Grand Champion Best in Dungeon', and demotes/promotes Carl to 'Royal Bodyguard'.

misc.party: The Royal Court of Princess Donut

update.note: Now a full crawler, not a pet. Stats Str 11 / Int 11 / Con 2 / Dex 8 / Cha 25 with the 'Enhanced Growth' buff (+1 Str/Int, +2 Cha per level, 4 points/level auto-assigned; Con locked at 2, Dex at 8). Learned Magic Missile from a Tome and received a Legendary Quadruped box holding the Enchanted Crown of the Sepsis Whore. Highest combined stats, so she leads the party; title 'Grand Champion Best in Dungeon'.

sources.quote: Strength: 11  Intelligence: 11  Constitution: 2  Dexterity: 8  Charisma: 25 ... Enhanced Growth. After an initial boost to four random stats, all additional levels will automatically grant +1 to Strength and Intelligence. Charisma will gain +2 per level.
Princess Donut has changed your title to Royal Bodyguard.
Princess Donut has named your party The Royal Court of Princess Donut. ... Princess Donut has changed her title to Grand Champion Best in Dungeon.
